chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-179 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 555/025 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CM 556/25 4.For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 Mr. Muhammad Yasmeen Khaskheli, Advocate along with petitioner No.1. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Petitioner No.1 Mst. Nazish is present and states that she being sui juris contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 without any pressure, compulsion and coercion, which has caused very much annoyed to her family members who are issuing threats for dire consequences. She further states that she has not been abducted or enticed away by anyone including the petitioner No.2; however, petitioners apprehend that petitioner No.2 and his family members will be booked in malicious false criminal cases at the hands of private respondents. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G present in Court in other matters while waiving notice submits that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and will not register any case with regard to so-called abduction of petitioner No.1. After such statement, learned counsel for petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of a/w listed applications with directions to the SSPs, Khairpur and Naushahro Feroze to provide protection to both the petitioners, as and when they needed and no FIR in respect of alleged abduction of petitioner No.1 be registered. JUDGE Ahmad
